name: Quality Connection Trnsprtn
recent_news: No M&A or operational news located. Listed in Maryland business directories at 1717 Largo Rd, Upper Marlboro; appears to be a very small (3-employee) NEMT/special-needs livery operator with no school-bus contract footprint identified.
fit_notes: Likely a micro NEMT/livery operator, not a yellow-bus contractor. Sub-scale (3 employees, ~$180K revenue) and no school-district relationships found, so very low tuck-in priority for Summit unless tied to a specific MD bolt-on cluster.

name: R & D Transportation
districts_or_customers: Anoka County area school districts (special education and McKinney-Vento/homeless student trips)
recent_news: No recent M&A. Company self-reports >20 years of specialized transportation for school districts, special education and McKinney-Vento students; fleet grown from 1 vehicle in 1998 to ~40 sedans/minivans/wheelchair-ramp vehicles serving Anoka County and surrounding districts.
fit_notes: Genuine SPED/alt-transportation operator in Twin Cities north-metro with ~40 small vehicles and multi-district relationships - exactly the alt-transportation tuck-in profile (SPED/McKinney-Vento) that complements Summit's yellow-bus platform. Founder-owned since 1998 suggests likely succession opportunity. Note employee count in source file (3) likely understates true headcount given 40-vehicle fleet.

name: Evening Magic Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or school-contract news located. Only listing is on an archived limousine directory (limocompany.org) which itself disclaims accuracy; no operating website, no Adams County school district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Appears to be a rural Adams County limousine/livery service, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in - skip.

name: Livery Services
recent_news: No M&A, school-district, or operational news located. Muskegon Public Schools transportation is outsourced to Dean Transportation, not to this entity. Company does not appear on the Michigan DOT current authorized bus carriers list under this name.
fit_notes: Likely a small private limousine/livery operator, not a yellow-bus or SPED school-transport contractor. Out of scope for Summit - skip.

name: Presidntial Lmousines Of Texas
recent_news: No school transportation contracts identified. Wichita Falls ISD outsources its student transportation to GoldStar Transit, not to this operator. Local entity (often listed as Presidential Taxi & Limousine / Presidential Transportation Inc) appears to be a taxi/limo/charter operator at 201/726 E Scott Ave, Wichita Falls.
fit_notes: Wichita Falls taxi/limo operator, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in - skip. Not to be confused with Presidential Transportation Inc. (presidentialtrans.com), which is an unrelated New Jersey school/charter operator.
